title: Director, Product Manager, Developer Experience, AI
company_focus: Global financial services and investment management
description:
DIRECTOR PRODUCT MANAGER, DEVELOPER EXPERIENCE – AI
INITIATIVES

At BNY, our culture allows us to run our company better and
enables employees’ growth and success. As a leading global
financial services company at the heart of the global
financial system, we influence nearly 20% of the world’s
investible assets. Every day, our teams harness cutting-edge
AI and breakthrough technologies to collaborate with
clients, driving transformative solutions that redefine
industries and uplift communities worldwide.

Recognized as a top destination for innovators, BNY is where
bold ideas meet advanced technology and exceptional talent.
Together, we power the future of finance – and this is what
#LifeAtBNY is all about. Join us and be part of something
extraordinary.

We’re seeking a future team member for the role of Senior
Product Manager to join our Developer Experience team. This
role is located in New York, NY or Pittsburgh, PA.

In this role, you’ll make an impact in the following ways:

- Define the vision and develop the long-term product strategy
  and roadmap for BNY’s developer-facing AI capabilities,
  including generative AI-powered tools that transform
  software engineering practices.
- Lead cross-functional collaboration with Engineering, DevEx
  teams, and BNY’s AI Hub to build impactful solutions that
  supercharge BNY’s global developer community.
- Drive product discovery efforts to deeply understand
  developer pain points and identify valuable automation and
  augmentation opportunities.
- Own the strategy behind both internally developed AI
  capabilities and vendor AI tools that augment the
  developer experience.
- Evangelize the vision and secure buy-in from senior
  technology and business stakeholders across the
  organization.
- Define success metrics and partner with analytics teams to
  measure adoption, performance, business impact, and
  customer sentiment.
- Stay current on trends in Generative AI, Developer
  Experience, and MLOps, incorporating emerging capabilities
  into the product roadmap.

To be successful in this role, we’re seeking the following:

- Bachelor's degree in business management, Finance or a
  related discipline, or equivalent work experience required
- 10-12 years of experience in product management, with a
  focus on internal platforms, developer tools, or
  infrastructure.
- Strong technical literacy with the ability to partner
  directly with engineers and understand modern software
  development practices.
- Proven track record of delivering impactful internal
  products that solve real engineering problems at scale.
- Exceptional communication, stakeholder management, and
  cross-functional collaboration skills.
- Passion for emerging technologies and a pragmatic mindset
  about their application in large-scale enterprise
  settings.
- Experience mentoring or managing less senior members of the
  product community.

Preferred qualifications include:

- Familiarity with large language models (LLMs), prompt
  engineering, or GenAI-powered developer tools.
- Experience working on Developer Experience (DevEx),
  Developer Relations (DevRel), or Platform Engineering
  teams.
- Deep knowledge of DevEx measurement strategies, including
  SPACE-like survey design and DORA metrics.
- Prior experience building or scaling AI/ML-powered internal
  products.
- Strong understanding of secure SDLC, CI/CD pipelines, or
  enterprise software development ecosystems.

At BNY, our culture speaks for itself, check out the latest
BNY news at:

BNY Newsroom BNY LinkedIn

Here’s a few of our recent awards:

America’s Most Innovative Companies, Fortune, 2025 World’s
Most Admired Companies, Fortune 2025 “Most Just Companies”,
Just Capital and CNBC, 2025

Our Benefits and Rewards:

BNY offers highly competitive compensation, benefits, and
wellbeing programs rooted in a strong culture of excellence
and our pay-for-performance philosophy. We provide access to
flexible global resources and tools for your life’s journey.
Focus on your health, foster your personal resilience, and
reach your financial goals as a valued member of our team,
along with generous paid leaves, including paid volunteer
time, that can support you and your family through moments
that matter.

BNY assesses market data to ensure a competitive
compensation package for our employees. The base salary for
this position is expected to be between $127,000 and
$250,000 per year at the commencement of employment.
However, base salary if hired will be determined on an
individualized basis, including as to experience and market
location, and is only part of the BNY total compensation
package, which, depending on the position, may also include
commission earnings, discretionary bonuses, short and long-
term incentive packages, and company- sponsored benefit
programs.

BNY is an Equal Employment Opportunity/Affirmative Action
Employer - Underrepresented racial and ethnic
groups/Females/Individuals with Disabilities/Protected
Veterans.
responsibilities: Define the vision and develop the long-term product strategy and roadmap for BNY's developer-facing AI capabilities, including generative AI-powered tools
Lead cross-functional collaboration with Engineering, DevEx teams, and BNY's AI Hub to build impactful solutions for the developer community
Drive product discovery efforts to deeply understand developer pain points and identify automation and augmentation opportunities
Own the strategy behind both internally developed AI capabilities and vendor AI tools that augment the developer experience
Evangelize the vision and secure buy-in from senior technology and business stakeholders across the organization
Define success metrics and partner with analytics teams to measure adoption, performance, business impact, and customer sentiment
Stay current on trends in Generative AI, Developer Experience, and MLOps, incorporating emerging capabilities into the product roadmap
use_cases: Generative AI-powered developer tools to transform software engineering practices
Internal developer productivity and experience enhancement
Automation and augmentation of developer workflows
AI-powered internal platforms for enterprise software development
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a product management role focused on developer
experience and AI tools, not on building or deploying AI
systems directly. The PM works with engineering teams to
define strategy for AI-powered developer tools, but doesn't
implement models, fine-tune LLMs, or work hands-on with
AI/ML systems. This is an enabling/planning role that
supports AI adoption rather than hands-on AI development.
